productDisplayName: Puma Men Daemon White Sports Shoes
description: A running shoe designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, the puma Daemon comes in a low-profile silhouette and stylish cuts that make it a fab everyday wear. Team it with jeans and t-shirts for unparalleled cool. Upper PU upper with a perforated overlay that has synthetic fabric piping Fabric lining for sweat-free comfort puma formstripe overlays on the sides in contrast colour Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned tongue, collar and footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Puma cat logo printed on the lateral toe box, tongue and back foot Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with hexagonal lugs on the medial forefoot and textured lugs on the lateral forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Curved midfoot for inner arch support shoe care Wipe surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
